title: [FIRRTL][LowerToHW] Copy InnerSymAttrs to lowered ops
body: This change ensures that when lowering InnerSymbol operations, we copy the existing inner symbol to the target, as well as properly adding a symbol on fieldID 0 when required.  This fixes an assumption of symbol name uniqueness, and they are now uniqued in the module's symbol namespace. A side effect of this change is that the used symbol names are always of the form `@sym_1`. This also fixes a bug where an InnerSymAttr was assumed to target field ID 0, and could result in an inccorect lowering of the DontTouch annotation.
